title: thalictrum minus proles dumulosum
intro: Thalictrum minus proles dumulosum, also known as the meadow rue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family and is native to Europe, western Asia, and northwestern Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of meadow rue include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Meadow rue is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusion or decoction, and it can also be used as a tincture or applied topically to the skin.
